title: Golden Age
description: This modpack aims to bring back the Golden Age of Minecraft, specifically Beta 1.7.3!
body:
# Dive into a simpler time.

This modpack aims to restore the way Minecraft played back in Beta 1.7.3 with a collection of mods, resource packs and scripts.

Credit to [ImNero](https://modrinth.com/user/ImNero) for the [RetroHungerLegacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/retro-hunger-legacy) mod, which I forked and modified and included in this modpack. (Licensed MIT)

## How to install

- Download the .mrpack file
- Install the pack using a custom launcher, such as the Modrinth App, Prism Launcher or MultiMC
- Enjoy! You can also join the official modpack's server, which is in the server list.

OptiFine is also recommended to allow for some minor details and performance improvements. You will need to install that yourself.

Join the [Discord!](https://discord.com/invite/h8qf5uUYVz)
